description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build C library that runs on every push and pull request. Build a C library in an ubuntu-22.04 job, package it with a script, upload the artifact, test the library with another script, and create a release if a tag is pushed. In a separate ubuntu-22.04 job, test building from the C library by downloading the artifact, extracting it, and running a build script. Finally, in an ubuntu-latest job, verify that both previous jobs succeeded.
